channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Congrats to Beth - the Beat Big Will Bracket Challenge Winner
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The final buzzer has sounded. The confetti has fallen. The Florida Gators are National Champions. KREX Sports Anchor Big Will Levenson was in the building to watch his Alma Mater Florida rise to the top of the College Basketball World. "Greatest experience of my life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Keegan Bradley's ace, special father-son moment highlights beloved Masters Par 3 Contest
item.description: Keegan Bradley drew the roar from spectators when he made an ace during the Par 3 Contest at Augusta National before enjoying a special celebration with his children.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL exec calls Shedeur Sanders 'fringe starter,' wary of pro upside: report
item.description: One NFC personnel executive referred to Shedeur Sanders as a 'fringe starter' despite being a consensus first-round pick in the 2025 NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Champions League: Raphinha and Lewandowski lead Barcelona to a 4-0 win
item.description: Raphinha and Robert Lewandowski struck again to lead Barcelona to a commanding 4-0 win over Borussia Dortmund in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Cardinals' Erick Fedde understands Marmol's decision to pull him with a no-hitter possible
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Erick Fedde did not give up any hits on Wednesday, but his walks prevented him from throwing a no-hitter. The St. Louis Cardinals right-hander pitched six innings on Wednesday against the Pittsburgh Pirates.
item.dc:creator: JOHN PERROTTO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kvaratskhelia's wonder goal helps PSG beat Aston Villa 3-1 in 1st leg of CL quarterfinals
item.description: A wonder goal from Khvicha Kvaratskhelia upstaged a brilliant curling shot from teammate Désiré Doué as Paris Saint-Germain beat Aston Villa 3-1 in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: Jerome Pugmire, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Joey Bart singles in 13th to give Pirates 2-1 win over Cardinals despite 6 hitless from Fedde
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Joey Bart singled in the winning run with the bases loaded in the 13th inning to give the Pittsburgh Pirates a 2-1 win over the St. Louis Cardinals on Wednesday, despite six hitless innings from Erick Fedde.
item.dc:creator: JOHN PERROTTO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Olympic golf to get a mixed-team event for the 2028 Los Angeles Games
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Mixed teams are coming to golf at the Los Angeles Olympics. The International Olympic Committee made it official Wednesday when it released the official program for the 2028 Games, in which female athletes are expected to have a slight majority for the first time.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Longtime caddie Bones Mackay gives 'secret' Masters rooting interest, intel on technology in the sport
item.description: Jim "Bones" Mackay said he has lots of friends competing at Augusta this week, but one player in particular has his rooting interest.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Min Woo Lee hits the Masters after his first PGA Tour win. Jason Day thinks he can be world No. 1
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Min Woo Lee broke into the top 25 in the world following his victory a couple weeks ago at the Houston Open, the long-awaited first on the PGA Tour for the big-hitting Australian who had won just about everywhere else around the world.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tarik Skubal says he's glad the keyhole at Comerica Park is gone after Tigers asked for input
item.description: The Detroit Tigers are wrapping up their first homestand with a subtle change on the field at Comerica Park, putting grass over a strip of dirt that used to be between the pitcher’s mound and home plate.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Buddy Hield entering rare company as Warriors’ iron man
item.description: Warriors guard Buddy Hield’s historic durability a product of work ethic that has helped him improve basketball in his native Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Grizzlies' Jaylen Wells breaks his wrist on hard landing that sent rookie to the hospital
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Memphis starting guard Jaylen Wells broke his right wrist on a hard fall on his arm and head from a midair collision at the end of a fast-break dunk during a victory over Charlotte on Tuesday, likely ending the rookie's season right before the Grizzlies go into the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: RICHARD WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canucks shock Stars with 3 goals in final minute, OT win
item.description: The Vancouver Canucks became the first team to score three goals in the final minute of regulation as they stunned the Dallas Stars on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Erik Karlsson scores his 200th goal as the Penguins beat the Blackhawks 5-0
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Erik Karlsson scored his 200th career goal to help the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-0 on Tuesday night. Sidney Crosby and Kris Letang also scored for Pittsburgh, which lost 3-1 at Chicago on Sunday. Kevin Hayes added two goals in the third period.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Nuggets fire head coach, GM with three games remaining before the playoffs
item.description: The decision comes as the Nuggets only have three regular-season games remaining before the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Giants 2025 City Connect uniforms draw mixed reactions on social media
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants will debut their new City Connect uniforms Tuesday night when they welcome the Cincinnati Reds to Oracle Park. Ahead of the game, the team gave fans a preview of the uniforms in a post on X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Tickets to the Salt Lake Bees new stadium will cost you more than they used to
item.description: The Salt Lake Bees are playing their first game at the new ballpark in South Jordan tomorrow, though fans of the team might notice that prices are a little different than Smith's Ballpark.
item.dc:creator: Sorina Trauntvein, ABC 4

item.title: Johnny Gaudreau's wife Meredith announces birth of couple's third child
item.description: Johnny and his brother were killed in New Jersey when they were riding bicycles and struck from behind by a suspected drunk driver.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: Bulls championship banners back up in United Center rafters earlier than expected
item.description: The Chicago Bulls' six championship banners have been rehung at the United Center after being removed due to damage from a rock concert by Disturbed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Florida makes push all the way to NCAA title game, will face Houston team that pushes others around
item.description: Florida has gone from being picked to finish sixth in the rugged Southeastern Conference to pushing all the way to the final Monday night of the season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Geese make nest next to iconic Wrigley Field bleachers during Chicago Cubs games
item.description: The iconic Wrigley Field bleachers welcomed an unusual guest during the Chicago Cubs' series against the San Diego Padres this weekend.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin fired just about the perfect version of his signature one-timer that has defined his remarkable career. When the puck hit the net, it made him the top goal scorer in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Duke's push for 6th NCAA title falls apart in unlikely late collapse against Houston in Final Four
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Up by double figures in the second half at the Final Four, closing in on the chance to play for yet another national championship, Duke was right where it had worked all season to be. What happened next was unforgettable, history of the most painful kind.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Red Rocks roll into the NCAA Nationals again
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - For the 49th straight year, the Utah gymnastics team is headed to the NCAA Nationals. The #4 Red Rocks won their NCAA Regional Final meet, edging past #5 UCLA, Denver and Minnesota on Saturday with a score of 197.825.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The Final Four again has multiple 5th-year starters. This time, it's a farewell to an uncommon era
item.description: “Credit to the NCAA for giving us a year back because that COVID year, that wasn’t real, honestly. Nah, it wasn’t fun at all.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Giants home opener game Friday celebrating 25th season at Oracle Park
item.description: The San Francisco Giants are starting their 25th Major League Baseball season at Oracle Park on Friday with their home opener game against the Seattle Mariners. At 1:35 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Fencer refuses to compete against transgender opponent
item.description: Turner told NewsNation she didn’t “want to let people know that I'm OK with this and pretend like nothing's happening.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation
